title: Vainglory
description: Adds a lance. Made for ModFest: Carnival
body:
Adds a lance and some new enchantments spesifically for it. 

**Enchantments**
- Skewering: 
  - Increases the amount of mobs able to be skewered/damaged by 1. 
  - Stacks to V, capping at 8 mobs.
- Cavalier: 
  - Deals bonus dash damage while riding mobs or minecarts. 
  - Mutex with smite and bane.
- Intrepid: 
  - Increases acceleration speed and top speed of dashing. 
  - Stacks to IV, increasing the acceleration by 50% and doubling the max speed.
- Wind Rider: 
  - Located in trial chambers. 
  - Reworks dashing into being a short burst of movement, which ignores gravity. 
  - Intrepid increases the distance.
- Excavator: 
  - Found in archaeology. 
  - Dashes will break through tagged blocks. 
  - Examples include cobwebs and leaves. 
  - Mutex with wind rider.
- Vainglory: 
  - Located in bastion remnants. 
  - Slain foes restore 1 HP.
- Gale Force: 
  - Creates an explosion/particle effect and knockback whenever dashing.
- Broadside
  - Increases radius mobs can be damaged in.
